Package recoder.convenience

Class ASTIteratorAdapter

java.lang.Object
recoder.convenience.ASTIteratorAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
ASTIteratorListener
public class ASTIteratorAdapter extends Object implements ASTIteratorListener
the "default" implementation for iterator listeners. This class may serve as a base class for derived specialized versions.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface recoder.convenience.ASTIteratorListener

    ENTER_ALL, ENTER_NONE, ENTER_SOME

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    enterChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
    Determines whether or not a given child node should be visited.
    int
    enterChildren(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode)
    Called to determine whether or not children nodes should be visited.
    void
    enteringNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called whenever an AST node is entered.
    void
    leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called just before an AST node is left.
    void
    returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
    Called immediately after the iterator returned from the child node.

  • Method Details

    • enteringNode

      public void enteringNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
      Description copied from interface: ASTIteratorListener
      This method is called whenever an AST node is entered.
      Specified by:
      enteringNode in interface ASTIteratorListener
      Parameters:
      it - the ASTIterator that called this method.
      node - the node that is currently entered.

    • leavingNode

      public void leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
      Description copied from interface: ASTIteratorListener
      This method is called just before an AST node is left.
      Specified by:
      leavingNode in interface ASTIteratorListener
      Parameters:
      it - the ASTIterator that called this method.
      node - the node that is about to be left.

    • enterChildren

      public int enterChildren(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode)
      Description copied from interface: ASTIteratorListener
      Called to determine whether or not children nodes should be visited.
      Specified by:
      enterChildren in interface ASTIteratorListener
      Parameters:
      it - the ASTIterator that called this method.
      thisNode - the current node.
      Returns:
      either ENTER_NONE, ENTER_SOME or ENTER_ALL.

    • enterChildNode

      public boolean enterChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
      Description copied from interface: ASTIteratorListener
      Determines whether or not a given child node should be visited.
      Specified by:
      enterChildNode in interface ASTIteratorListener
      Parameters:
      it - the ASTIterator that called this method.
      thisNode - the current node.
      childNode - the child node that might be visited next.
      Returns:
      true if the iterator should proceed to the given child node.

    • returnedFromChildNode

      public void returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
      Description copied from interface: ASTIteratorListener
      Called immediately after the iterator returned from the child node.
      Specified by:
      returnedFromChildNode in interface ASTIteratorListener
      Parameters:
      it - the ASTIterator that called this method.
      thisNode - the current node.
      childNode - the child node that has just been visited.
